description: A Commercial Construction project for a three-story office building is open in ProjectLibre. A project controls audit has revealed multiple data quality issues introduced during a system migration, including corrupted task durations, missing predecessor links, and unrealistic negative lead times. Perform a thorough schedule audit across all phases to identify and correct all data integrity issues. Save the corrected project to /home/ga/Documents/construction_audit_fixed.pod.

injected_errors.error: Duration changed from PT480H (60 days) to PT40H (5 days). Steel fabrication and delivery in 5 working days is physically impossible.
Duration changed from PT80H (10 days) to PT800H (100 days). Shop drawing submission does not take 100 working days.

injected_errors.task_name: Form 2nd floor including all floor openings
injected_errors.error: All predecessor links removed. This task originally depended on tasks 53, 14, 15, 16, 48.
Predecessor 38 (Set reinforcing and anchor bolts) given lag of -480 hours (-60 days). You cannot pour concrete 60 days before reinforcing is set.
Duration changed from PT200H (25 days) to PT16H (2 days). Exterior masonry for a 3-story building cannot be completed in 2 days.
